query: I just noticed Day 2 has no breakfast, my first meeting is at 9am and I'll be starving. Add a quick hotel breakfast before the meeting.

fields.name: Quick Hotel Breakfast (Lobby Restaurant)
fields.description: Quick hotel breakfast with coffee, pastries, yogurt, fresh fruit and hot options. Can be eaten in the hotel restaurant or grabbed to go for the short walk to the meeting.
fields.expected_cost: Included with stay / CAD 5-10 for extras
